style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial decision diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A box on the left labelled A RECURRING TASK leads by arrow to a diamond labelled MORE THAN THREE TIMES A WEEK? A short NO branch loops back to a small box labelled DO IT BY HAND. The YES branch leads rightward to a box labelled BUILD AND DOCUMENT THE AGENT, then to a box labelled SHARE WITH THE UNIT. Beside the final box, three small identical workflow icons suggest the whole unit reusing it. A small caption reads THE RULE OF THREE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: 'UNE TÂCHE RÉCURRENTE', 'PLUS DE TROIS FOIS PAR SEMAINE?', 'NON', 'LE FAIRE À LA MAIN', 'OUI', 'CONSTRUIRE ET DOCUMENTER L'AGENT', 'PARTAGER AVEC L'UNITÉ', caption 'LA RÈGLE DE TROIS'. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial decision diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A box on the left labelled A RECURRING TASK leads by arrow to a diamond labelled MORE THAN THREE TIMES A WEEK? A short NO branch loops back to a small box labelled DO IT BY HAND. The YES branch leads rightward to a box labelled BUILD AND DOCUMENT THE AGENT, then to a box labelled SHARE WITH THE UNIT. Beside the final box, three small identical workflow icons suggest the whole unit reusing it. A small caption reads THE RULE OF THREE. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
